'''Cammy''' was a [[Holocam E]]-series [[Droid/Legends|droid]] who helped a [[Unidentified Rebel agent (droid builder)|Rebel agent]] to find and infiltrate an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] factory on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. She also helped test the droids that the agent built, following them around as they went about their objectives.

==Biography==
Cammy was a a [[Holocam E]]-series [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufactured by [[Trang Robotics]],<ref name="NEGD" /> a [[Drewwa]]-based manufacturer.<ref name="FF">{{FactFile|47|MAN 5-6|Droid Manufacturers}}</ref> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], that droid with a cheery [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Programmer/Legends|programming]] was acquired by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], a resistance group that tried to overthrow the dominant and oppressive [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The Alliance programmed her with basic mechanical, technical, and scientific knowledge so she could assist its secret operatives. Around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], she helped a [[Unidentified Rebel agent (droid builder)|Rebel agent]] reprogram a [[Hidden droid factory|hidden factory]] on the planet of Tatooine, where the Empire had designed a [[Unidentified Imperial assassin droid|new series]] of [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]].<ref name="DW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Cammy spoke with a thick [[Wikipedia:Southern American accent|Southern American accent]] and also [[binary]].

*''[[Star Wars: DroidWorks]]'' {{1st}}
